content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.65% with Bank Nifty -1.11% and PSU Bank -1.13% leading weakness; VIX +3.25% to 17.16 signals rising uncertainty. However, IT (+0.91%), Capital Goods, Chemicals, and Auto are showing strong selective leadership on Q4 earnings catalysts. Breadth is mixed — it's a stock-picker's tape, not a directional one. Existing book is +1.28% on the day with multiple winners; priority is to lock in gains via trail-SLs rather than chase extended breakouts.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24050,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1065.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "PNBHOUSING +10.2% unrealized, CMP 1090.60, Q4 strong (PAT +19.2%, GNPA <1%, AUM cross 90k Cr). Trail SL from 1072.12 to 1065 — wait, current SL 1072.12 is already tighter and locks in ~9% gain; only loosening would violate rule. Holding SL at 1072.12 and raising target visibility — keeping SL at current 1072.12, but extending upside thinking would be a no-op. Actually trailing further: with CMP 1090.60, a SL at 1072 = 1.7% trail-gap (acceptable >1%). Holding current SL since it already locks gains. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "GOLDBEES +1.69% today on VIX spike, hedge thesis intact. -0.7% unrealized, SL 121 (-3.3% from CMP) is appropriate. Hold as portfolio hedge."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 818.00,
      "new_target": 845.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "MARICO +2.64% today at 52w high 828.50, Q4 PAT +14%, revenue +22%. SL at 818 currently sits 1.3% below CMP — within acceptable trail-gap. No-op MODIFY = HOLD. Switching."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "COFORGE +16.58% today, +8.3% unrealized. CMP 1362.60, current SL 1338.68 = 1.75% trail-gap (above 1% floor). SL already locks in ~6.3% gain. Q4 strong, Encora deal positive. Letting winner run; SL is appropriate."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 3030.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "GRSE +5.17% today, +1.4% unrealized. SL 3030 currently 1.2% below CMP 3067 — within tolerance. No-op. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CAMS +5.31% today on 7.4x volume, +4.2% unrealized. CMP 839.75, SL 825 = 1.75% trail-gap (acceptable). Q4 record EBITDA margin 46.5%, strong institutional flows. Hold for run to 875 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "PIDILITIND +8.72% on the day after Q4 beat (PAT +37%, EBITDA margin +280bps). -0.4% unrealized due to entry at peak; SL 1445 = 2.6% below CMP. Thesis just confirmed — hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "WOCKPHARMA +4.72% on 11.8x volume, -0.6% unrealized. SL 1580 = 1.8% below CMP. Pharma sector at 52w high, Zaynich pipeline catalyst. Hold for momentum continuation."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SRF +10.31% today, +0.1% unrealized just entered. SL 2745 = 1.5% below CMP. Q4 PAT +11%, capex pipeline strong. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "POLYCAB +9.36% to 52w high 9117, +0.1% unrealized. SL 9020 = 1.1% below CMP — at the trail-gap floor. Q4 record revenue, Rs 47 dividend. Hold for run."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BHARATFORG +7.43% today to 52w high, -0.7% unrealized due to entry at peak. SL 1955 = 2.5% below CMP. Q4 PAT -17.4% but revenue +18%, defence book Rs 10,961 Cr is the re-rating leg. NA truck headwind noted. Hold with current SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "ABCAPITAL -0.5% unrealized, CMP 362.95 near 52w high. SL 354 = 2.5% below CMP. Q4 PAT +30.6%, AUM +16%. Hold for ECLGS rerating."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BAJAJ-AUTO -0.6% unrealized, CMP 10713. Q4 PAT +34%, buyback at Rs 12,000 (~12% premium to CMP) is the catalyst. SL 10440 = 2.5% below CMP. Hold for buyback record date trigger."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1072.12,
      "reasoning": "SL already locks ~9% gain; trail-gap 1.7%. Letting winner run."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position, SL 3.3% below CMP — appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 818.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 1.3% below CMP, within trail-gap tolerance."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1338.68,
      "reasoning": "SL locks ~6.3% gain, trail-gap 1.75% — letting +16% breakout run to 1420 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 3030.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 1.2% below CMP, defence sector momentum intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "reasoning": "SL locks ~2.4% gain, trail-gap 1.75%, Q4 catalyst in motion."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1445.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat just confirmed thesis, SL 2.6% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1580.00,
      "reasoning": "Pharma momentum + 11.8x volume signal, SL 1.8% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2745.00,
      "reasoning": "Just entered, SL 1.5% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 9020.00,
      "reasoning": "52w high breakout, SL 1.1% below CMP at trail-gap floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1955.00,
      "reasoning": "Defence catalyst leg intact; SL absorbs normal pullback."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 354.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 strong, near 52w high, SL 2.5% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 10440.00,
      "reasoning": "Buyback catalyst pending record date; SL 2.5% below CMP gives room."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "REJECTED NEW ENTRIES (per Rule 18 explicit per-name justification): (1) THERMAX +14.5% to 52w high — extended chase, capital goods cluster already saturated (POLYCAB+GRSE+BHARATFORG+FINCABLES exposure). (2) FINCABLES +7.72% — Q4 board meeting May 10 within 3 sessions, binary event Rule 11 + cluster cap. (3) LAURUSLABS — already have WOCKPHARMA pharma exposure. (4) PERSISTENT — already have COFORGE IT exposure. (5) BAJAJ-AUTO already held; no add. (6) NUVAMA +20% — news-driven spike, no defined SL setup. (7) TATATECH 12.8x volume — unclear catalyst, NO_ACTION until research clarity. (8) INDUSINDBK — Rule 13 governance overhang (SFIO probe unresolved), reject. (9) DABUR/RAMCOCEM/LUPIN/APOLLOTYRE/GABRIEL — sub-threshold conviction vs already-held names; deployed at 61% with 13 positions, marginal admit adds correlation not edge. (10) HFCL OPEN MIS BUY at 133.50 placed 3384min ago = stale across sessions, CANCELLING — see decisions. Capital goods cluster (POLYCAB, GRSE, BHARATFORG) approaching cluster cap; BFSI cluster (PNBHOUSING, CAMS, ABCAPITAL) ditto. Book is well-deployed with right thematic mix; protecting gains > stacking more.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 61%, well within soft target. Book has 13 positions skewing cap-goods + BFSI + chemicals + IT — broad and earnings-season aligned. Today's tape favors protecting unrealized +₹11,602 over chasing extended breakouts. Stale HFCL OPEN order from prior session needs cancel — adding below."
}
